For farmed (aquaculture) seafood Coles Own Brand products must be certified by: Aquaculture Stewardship Council (ASC); Best Aquaculture Practices (BAP); or GLOBALG.A.P. This Atlantic salmon has been raised in the cool waters of Tasmania and is carefully selected for its quality and freshness.

This Atlantic salmon has been raised in the cool waters of Tasmania and is carefully selected for its quality and freshness.

long_description: The health star rating provides a quick, easy, standard way to compare similar packaged foods. It's simple: the more stars, the healthier the choice. Look for the health star rating when selecting Coles Brand food and drinks. Need a nutritious fibre-rich cereal to provide 59% of your daily fibre needs for gut health benefits? Coles High Fibre Bran is an excellent source of dietary fibre for assisting gut regularity^. High in energy releasing B1, B2, B3 vitamins, plus a good source of essential iron and folate for immunity. A source of protein for maintaining healthy muscles and bones. Sprinkle crisp crunchy Coles High Fibre Bran over your favourite cereal, fruit yoghurt or smoothie. Bake in muffins for extra nutrition and fibre.

long_description:
Weet-Bix Cholesterol Lowering takes Australia's No. 1 breakfast cereal and adds the functional benefit of cholesterol-lowering plant sterols. It's the only cereal on the market to contain 2g of plant sterols in 1 serve, making it the ideal choice for those wanting to reduce their cholesterol. Effective, easy, enjoyable and plant sterols are recommended by the Heart Foundation.

† 2g of plant sterols daily lowers cholesterol within 4 weeks as part of a healthy diet low in saturated fat. 
  • Reduces cholesterol by up to 9%. Clinically Proven. 2g of plant sterols daily lowers cholesterol within 4 weeks as part of a healthy diet low in saturated fat.

  • 88% wholegrain

  • Low sugar

  • Low in Saturated Fat

  • High in Thiamin

long_description:
Kellogg's Sustain Original breakfast cereal with 56% whole grains is an energising combination of wheat, corn, rice and oat flakes, mixed with fruit and nuts including sultanas, currants and apple pieces with crunchy sliced almonds. It's a nutritious and delicious source of energy to start your day.

So whether it's at breakfast to help get you started in the morning or as a nutritious snack before training, Sustain provides you with energy (contains 630kJ per serve) to support you as part of a healthy varied diet.

Get active... and enjoy Sustain.
  • High in whole grain

  • Source of fibre

  • Good source of B vitamins and iron

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Suitable for vegans

long_description:
Kellogg's All-Bran Honey Almond is made from crunchy flakes of whole wheat and wheat bran, with golden honey and sprinkled with almonds. A high fibre breakfast cereal that's healthy and delicious. Plus the wheat bran fibre is clinically proven to promote regularity* - the tasty way to get things moving.

*Wheat bran fibre increases stool weight and reduces intestinal transit time to promote regularity as part of a healthy varied diet.
  • High in Fibre

  • Good source of 4 vitamins including B2, Niacin, B6 and Folate

  • Source of Zinc

  • High in whole grain

  • 4.5 health stars

Kellogg's Crunchy Nut Corn Flakes breakfast cereal is irresistibly tasty. We've taken our famous crunchy flakes of corn, encrusted them with peanut pieces and coated them in delicious honey. With all that extra crunch, they not only look extra golden, but sound great too! The taste? Sensational! So why not treat yourself to the most irresistible breakfast cereal imaginable? Feeling adventurous? Treat yourself to a bowl as an afternoon or late night snack.

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Great for snacking

Kellogg's Coco Pops Chex breakfast cereal with real cocoa has a delicious chocolatey taste, in a light and crunchy criss-crossed pillow that's fun to eat.

The delicious chocolatey taste and crunchy texture makes these great to snack on, or enjoy in a bowl of milk - just like a chocolate milkshake... only crunchy!

Crunch your way through breakfast or afternoon snack time with Coco Pops Chex!

long_description:
Everybody needs a guardian and the psyllium found in Kellogg's Guardian breakfast cereal helps to look after your heart*. Guardian is made from delicious whole grain wheat and barley with added psyllium and oat bran to give you a healthy and nutritious start to the day. What's more, this delicious breakfast cereal is high in fibre and whole grains. So give your heart something to smile about with Kellogg's Guardian.

*Psyllium reduces bile acid reabsorption which increases the degradation of liver cholesterol and contributes to heart health as part of a healthy varied diet containing 3g of psyllium per day. A 40g serve of Guardian provides 4.4g psyllium.
  • Very high in fibre

  • 97% fat free

  • Source of Soluble Fibre

  • Good Source of Iron

  • Source of Zinc

  • Suitable for vegans.

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

Special K Forest Berries breakfast cereal combines Special K flakes with dried strawberries and blueberries for a delicious start to the day. It's a source of protein and fibre. Each serve provides your body with protein plus essential vitamins and minerals. With a healthy varied diet and physical activity, you'll be on your way to living a nourished lifestyle!

  • Source of Protein

  • Source of Zinc, Vitamin D and Iron

  • Source of whole grain.

  • 4 health stars.

long_description:
Finding a nutritious breakfast cereal that kids love to eat can be a challenge - Kellogg's Rice Bubbles is a great choice - it's both fun and nutritious. Made from the puffed grains of whole white rice, Kellogg's Rice Bubbles helps give kids a great start to the day. Kellogg's Rice Bubbles is low in fat, contain no preservatives and no artificial colours or flavours. They're also high in carbohydrates and provides essential nutrients to provide a great start to the day.

  • Contains 6 vitamins and minerals

  • Good source of Iron and B Vitamins

  • Source of zinc

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No preservatives

  • FODMAP friendly.

  • Low in fat.

country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 99% Australian ingredients
description: KELLOGGS ALL BRAN CEREAL WHEAT BRAN FLAKES
ingredients: Whole grain wheat (53%), wheat bran (35%), sugar, barley malt extract, salt, minerals (iron, zinc oxide) , vitamins (niacin, vitamin B6, riboflavin, folate). (Natural source of magnesium).
long_description:
Healthy and delicious, these crunchy flakes of whole wheat and wheat bran provide you with 26% of your daily fibre intake. That's so simple, one bowl and you are a quarter of the way there. What's more, the natural wheat bran fibre in All-Bran Wheat Flakes Breakfast Cereal is clinically proven to promote regularity which is important for your digestive health*. Grab a bowl, a cup or a glass and top with your favourite milk or reduced fat yoghurt and fruit for a nutritiously complete breakfast.   

*Wheat bran fibre increases stool weight and reduces intestinal transit time to promote regularity as part of a healthy varied diet.
  • Very high in fibre

  • Good source of 4 vitamins including B2, Niacin, B6 and Folate

  • Good source of iron

  • High in whole grain

  • Source of Magnesium

  • Source of Zinc.

  • Suitable for vegans.

  • 5 health stars.

Kellogg's Crispix honey pillows breakfast cereal are mouth-watering, crispy pillows of golden corn with a hint of honey! It's the unique lattice shape that makes each pillow super crispy, while the honey and corn combine to create a taste sensation! Drench with fresh, cold milk and enjoy at breakfast time to get your day started right, or indulge in a delicious afternoon snack!
  • No artificial colours or preservatives

  • Great for snacking or on-the-go

As a tasty breakfast or snack on the go - these Weet-Bix Protein Bites are packed with 10g protein per serve, wholegrains, fibre, taste delicious & pack a mighty crunch. Plus iron & B vitamins to help kick start your day.

High in protein - 10g per serve

High in fibre

Very high in wholegrains, 72% of your daily wholegrain needs* *One 50g serve of Weet-Bix Protein Bites contributes 72% of the 48g wholegrain daily target

High in iron

High in folate

Good source of vitamins B1, B2 & B3

Enjoy as part of a healthy balanced diet.

Each single serve assists your body with protein, fibre as well as essential vitamins and minerals.  With a balance of a healthy varied diet and physical activity, you'll be well on your way to living a nourished lifestyle!

  • Low in fat

  • Contains whole grain

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

  • 4 health stars.

Enjoy as part of a healthy balanced diet.

description: WEET-BIX LITTLE KIDS ESSENTIALS BREAKFAST CEREAL 400G
ingredients: Wholegrain cereals (97%) [wheat (77%), rye (10%), sorghum (10%)], raw sugar, calcium rich seaweed, barley malt extract, minerals (iron, zinc), vitamins (B3, B2, B6, B1, folate).
long_description:
Essential nutrition that supports reaching healthy growth and development milestones (Contains 9 essential vitamins and minerals that contribute to little kids healthy growth and development as part of a healthy diet). 

Tailored nutrition for a yummy start every day.

- Prebiotics
Nourish your child's good behavior (Prebiotic fibre promotes the growth of bifidobacteria and lactobacillus, as part of a healthy diet.)
- High Fibre, naturally 29% of kids daily needs (29% of kids 1-3 years adequate fibre intake.)
- 3 Whole grains: wheat + rye + sorghum
- 97 wholegrain. natural, diverse goodness
- 9 essential vitamins & minerals enriched to support healthy little kids

- Full of wholegrain goodness
- High in Iron
- No added salt
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

5 benefits for healthy growing kids
Calcium
- Strong bones, teeth & muscles
Vit B1, Magnesium, Iron
- Sharp brain & cognition function
Folate, Zinc
- Promotes strong natural immune defences
Vit B2, B3, B6
- Active energy to grow, learn, play
Fibres
- Thrive digestive & tummy regularity

Enjoy as part of a healthy diet. 

5 benefits for healthy growing kids
Unique & Tailored blend of ingredients
- Prebiotics
- High Fibre
- 3 Whole grains
- 9 essential vitamins & minerals
- Low sugar

It's low in sugar and high in fibre, with added iron and calcium, which is important for growth and well-being
Kid's Dietitian
  • high fibre

  • 3 wholegrains

  • 9 essential vitamins and minerals

  • no added salt

  • no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • low sugar.

  • prebiotics.

long_description:
Kellogg's All-Bran Original is a high fibre breakfast cereal with 5 health stars and an easy way to help get the fibre you need for your digestive health! The natural wheat bran fibre found in Kellogg's All-Bran is clinically proven to help with regularity and can work in as little as 3 days*. All-Bran has been looking after the digestive health of Australians since 1929. With 42% of your daily fibre intake in one bowl, it's the easy way to help get the fibre you need to look after your digestive health. Add seasonal fruit and reduced fat yoghurt for a twist on an old favourite.

*Wheat bran fibre increases stool weight and reduces intestinal transit time to promote regularity as part of a healthy varied diet.
  • Very high in fibre - 42% of daily fibre needs

  • Low GI

  • Good source of 4 vitamins - B2, Niacin, B6 & Folate

  • Good source of iron

  • Source of Zinc

  • Suitable for vegans.

  • 5 health stars.

High in Folate

Enjoy as part of a balanced diet and active lifestyle.

Kellogg's Sultana Bran is a great way to start the day off right.
  • High in fibre and high in whole grain

  • Low in fat

  • Good Source of 4 vitamins including folate

  • Source of magnesium and zinc

  • Suitable for vegans and vegetarians.

long_description:
Finding a nutritious breakfast cereal that kids love to eat can be a challenge - Kellogg's Rice Bubbles is a great choice - it's both fun and nutritious. Made from the puffed grains of whole white rice, Kellogg's Rice Bubbles helps give kids a great start to the day. Kellogg's Rice Bubbles is low in fat, contain no preservatives and no artificial colours or flavours. They're also high in carbohydrates and provides essential nutrients to provide a great start to the day.

  • Contains 6 vitamins and minerals

  • Good source of Iron and B Vitamins

  • Source of zinc

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No preservatives

  • FODMAP friendly.

  • Low in fat.

Indulge in

Red Tractor Protein Low Sugar Choc Almond Granola Clusters

, a rich mix of real chocolate and roasted almonds, baked into golden crunchy clusters. With lower sugar and a source of protein, this granola brings balance and indulgence to your breakfast routine.

Made from Australian wholegrain oats and lightly sweetened with stevia, it's a delicious health food choice that fits active, mindful lifestyles.

  • Low sugar and high protein blend
  • 8g protein per serve
  • Less than 2g sugar per serve
  • High in Fibre
  • No artificial flavours & colours
  • Fruit Free Crunchy baked clusters recipe
  • Made with Australian wholegrain oats
  • Ideal vegan-friendly cereal
  • 5 Health star rating

Basically we take simple, good stuff and don't mess about with it. Delicious. 

Our Guarantee of Tasty & Wholesome
- Packed with a crunch
- Just how you lilke them

Love our clusters?

We do too. That's why we take so much care in making them. We start with whole grain oats baked together with a little sugar to create our famous clusters, packed with flavour and goodness. Then we add in delicious pecan pieces. Oh, and they stay crunchy to the last bite!

- Suitable for Vegetarians
- Source of Fibre
- No added salt
  • Baked with whole grain oats

  • Source of fibre

  • No artificial colours or preservatives

Our Guarantee of Tasty & Wholesome
- Crispy and crunchy
- Sliced, chopped and roasted

Love our clusters?

long_description:
Red Tractor Low Sugar Protein Granola Clusters not only deliver the protein you are looking for to start your day but are also low in sugar!
Our clusters start with wholesome and nutritious Australian rolled oats. We add a touch of sweetness with an all-natural sweetener, erythritol, and then oven bake for a delicious, satisfying crunch.
Blending in some succulent dried blueberries, sunflower seeds and pepitas mixed with natural vanilla flavouring, these delicious clusters are full of flavour.
A perfect way to start your day!
Only 2.4 grams of sugar per serve
8 grams of protein per serve
High in prebiotic fibre
Toasted Australian wholegrains
No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
Oven baked in Australia
5 Health Star Rating

long_description:
Looking for a breakfast that works as hard as you do? Kellogg's High Protein Granola fuels busy mornings. Crunchy whole grain clusters that are high in protein, high fibre, and under 5g sugar per bowl.

Kellogg's High Protein Granola Forest Berries Flavour is your new morning go to. This 5 health star rated granola contains crunchy whole grain oat clusters blended with deliciously sweet red berries.

Whether it's a quick breakfast with milk, a mid-morning snack with yoghurt, or a nourishing bowl topped with your favourite fruits and nuts, Kellogg's High Protein Granola Forest Berries Flavour delivers real nourishment. It's a delicious way to own your morning. 

Real Nourishment. For Real.
  • High Protein - 10g protein per serve

long_description:
Our Jordans family have been milling since 1855. We've always been passionate about natural ingredients, creating tasty recipes, and making incredible cereals. We've focussed this passion for ingredients and knowledge of blending to ensure every spoonful contains the perfect balance of whole grain oats and the tasty natural extras. It's just what you need to help kick start your day!

 

 

That's why we've been working hard to reduce it. It's been a tricky thing to do, as sugar helps create the crunchy texture and taste we know you love. But with no artificial colours or preservatives, and with the help of chicory root fibre, we've created this granola with less than 5% sugar.

Blended with hazelnuts and almonds we think it tastes pretty good too. So now there's even more reasons to enjoy our tasty crunchy clusters.

  • No artificial colours or preservatives

  • Whole grain oats

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Source of fibre

  • Less than 5% sugar

Looking for a breakfast that works as hard as you do? Kellogg's High Protein Granola fuels busy mornings. Crunchy whole grain clusters that are high in protein, high fibre, and under 5g sugar per bowl.

Kellogg's High Protein Granola Honey Nut is your new morning go to. This 5 health star rated granola contains crunchy whole grain oat clusters together with the delicious crunch of almonds and cashews with a hint of honey.

Whether it's a quick breakfast with milk, a mid-morning snack with yoghurt, or a nourishing bowl topped with your favourite fruits and nuts, Kellogg's High Protein Granola Honey Nut delivers real nourishment. It's a delicious way to own your morning. 

Real Nourishment. For Real.

long_description:
Basically we take simple, good stuff and don't mess about with it. Delicious. 

Our Guarantee of Tasty & Wholesome
- Naturally sweet
- Real strawberries
- Everyone's favourite berry

Love our clusters?

We do too. That's why we take so much care in making them. We start with whole grain oats baked together with a little sugar to create our famous clusters, packed with flavour and goodness. Then, we throw in a handful of the best strawberries we can find. Oh, and they stay crunchy to the last bite!

- Suitable for Vegetarians
- Source of Fibre
- No added salt

long_description:
Breakfast time... Anytime!

Simply crafted from Aussie whole grain oats, crispy rice puffs & real berry deliciousness... our baked clusters are the perfect balance of crunchiness & sweetness in every spoonful. 

Top with yoghurt and fresh strawberries (just like the bowl we've created) or simply snack on them straight from the box. 

You'll love the crunch! 
  • No artifical colours or flavours

  • Very high in whole grain

  • 4 health star rating

  • Proudly Australian made and owned for over 30 years

long_description:
A bowl of Aussie sunshine
Delicious blend of whole grains, almonds and honey to start your day right!

Our Story

Grounded in the goodness of quality, wholesome ingredients, each mouthful nurtures you with indulgent flavours.

Our signature blend is all you need to take on the world with open arms. Because when you are feeling good, you are unstoppable.

Whether it be for your brekky bowl, snack bowl, or after-dinner-want-a-little-treat-bowl - your can now keep the sun shining on you all day long.

Proudly Aussie Made

Give yourself more of the good things
Sunsol

Peanut butter
Whole grain oats
Almonds
Honey
Sunflower seeds
Rice crisps

Indulge in high protein granola goodness all day long
Shine on

long_description:
Low in sugar and highly delicious

Start your day in the most positive way by nourishing your body and soul.

Raspberry & Coconut is a sweet and tangy flavour combination & we've blended it with toasted whole grains & super seeds to create the perfect crisp granola.

With prebiotic fibre and less than 3g sugar per serve (contains on average less than 3g sugar per serve, excluding milk), it's mouth-wateringly good for you - not to mention, satisfying & light enough to enjoy every day!

  • Less than 3g of sugar

  • Excellent source of fibre

  • 5 health star rating

  • Proudly Australian made and owned for over 30 years

long_description:
Looking for a breakfast that works as hard as you do? Kellogg's High Protein Granola fuels busy mornings. Crunchy whole grain clusters that are high in protein, high fibre, and under 5g sugar per bowl.

Kellogg's High Protein Granola Apple Crumble Flavour is your new morning go to. This 5 health star rated granola contains crunchy whole grain oat clusters together with the wholesome flavours of spiced apple crumble.

Whether it's a quick breakfast with milk, a mid-morning snack with yoghurt, or a nourishing bowl topped with your favourite fruits and nuts, Kellogg's High Protein Granola Apple Crumble Flavour delivers real nourishment. It's a delicious way to own your morning. 

Real Nourishment. For Real.
  • High in protein - 10 g per serve

  • Less than 5g sugar per serve

  • High fibre

  • 5 Health Stars

  • Resealable pack

description: JORDANS CRUNCHY OAT CLUSTERS:WILD ABOUT BERRIE:.:500 GRAM
ingredients: Whole Grain Oat Cereals (51%) (Oat Flakes, Oat Flour), Sugar, Barley Flakes, Vegetable Oil, Rice Flour, Freeze Dried Berries (2.5%) (Whole Redcurrants (1%), Whole Blackcurrants (0.5%), Whole Blueberries (0.5%), Sliced Cranberries (0.5%)), Desiccated Coconut, Flavour.
long_description:
Basically we take simple, good stuff and don't mess about with it. Delicious. 

Our Guarantee of Tasty & Wholesome
- Real berries
- Lip smackingly delicious
- Only the best

Love our clusters?

We do too. That's why we take so much care in making them. We start with whole grain oats baked together with a little sugar to create our famous clusters, packed with flavour and goodness. Sprinkled with an assortment of redcurrants, blackcurrants, cranberries and blueberries. Oh, and our clusters stay crunchy to the last bite!

Help nature thrive with every spoonful!

At Jordans, we care about our farmers and native wildlife.
That's why we've taken a collaborative approach to UK sustainable farming, working with oat growers to set aside 10% of their farmland for wildlife.
This provides habitats, shelter, and food to threatened species.
So, every time you eat a spoonful of Jordans, you can feel good about helping nature thrive too!

- Suitable for Vegetarians
- Source of Fibre
- No added salt
  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Source of fibre

  • No added salt

Start your day right with

Red Tractor High Protein Honey Nut Granola

, combining 100% Australian wholegrain oats with the sweetness of honey and golden syrup. With 10g of protein per serve, it's a crunchy, satisfying granola designed to keep you feeling full and energised.


Made with simple, real ingredients and no artificial colours or flavours, this breakfast favourite is a proud member of the Red Tractor High Protein range , wholesome, Australian-made cereals for every morning:

  • Source of Fibre and wholegrain oats
  • Naturally crunchy texture
  • Sweetened with honey and golden syrup
  • Ideal healthy breakfast or snack
  • 4.5 Health Star rating

long_description:
Enjoy an 'Oat-standing' Breakfast! Start your morning with the taste of honey and creamy oats, delicious from the first spoonful to the last.UNCLE TOBYS Quick Sachets Creamy Honey Flavour are made with 100% Australian oats sourced from local farmers, specially cut, and rolled to make a creamy bowl of porridge in just 90 seconds!With 10 sachets, they're perfect for a tasty bowl of porridge topped with a drizzle of honey or fresh berries, overnight oats, smoothies, baking and more! For over 130 years, UNCLE TOBYS has been proudly producing quality oats. They source their oats from local farmers and produce their delicious products in Wahgunyah VIC, Australia.Healthy eating, supported by an active lifestyle, makes for a happier life. By continuing to serve families and communities, and supporting local farmers, UNCLE TOBYS are committed to the health and happiness of future generations. UNCLE TOBYS, experts in oats since 1893.
  • 100% Australian Oats

  • Ready in 90 seconds

long_description:
MORNINGS MADE EASY: WAKE UP TO THE GOODNESS OF OVERNIGHT OATS Start your morning with the refreshing taste of strawberry& vanilla flavour in a cool, creamy oat-so-good breakfast. UNCLE TOBYS Overnight Oat Sachets are your perfect prep-ahead brekkie, just add milk the night before and enjoy cold straight from the fridge. Made with 100% Australian oats, sourced from local farmers. A unique blend of UNCLE TOBYS thick and fine cut whole oats for that just-right overnight texture. No cooking, no rushing - just wholesome goodness, ready when you are.
  • Easy Overnight Oats - Just add milk the night before for a ready-to-eat breakfast.

  • Refreshing Flavour - Strawberry & vanilla blend for a cool, creamy start to your day.

  • Wholesome Ingredients - Made with 100% Australian oats for a nutritious, no-cook option.

ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Rolled Oats (100%).
long_description:
• 5 Healthstar Rating

  • Good source of fibre

  • Source of protein


    Are you a morning person? Wait, don't answer that until you've tried Coles Rolled Oats.


    So many possibilities: stir these all-Aussie oats into yoghurt with fresh berries. Warm them up with sliced apples, a sprinkling of cinnamon, a dollop of honey. Mix them into your favourite homemade granola. Coles Rolled Oats are the pedestal upon which you can sculpt your own breakfast masterpiece.


    This 1.8kg value pack will keep bellies full and breakfast fun for even the hungriest families. While they're loving the flavour, the natural compound beta-glucan helps lower cholesterol. You can feel good about serving Coles Rolled Oats at your family's breakfast table.


    So even if you're a diehard night owl, or you struggle to drag your kids out of bed before school, try starting your day with Coles Rolled Oats. And don't be surprised if you all start looking forward to the morning.

description: UNCLE TOBYS OATS SACHETS CINNAMON SCROLL 280G
ingredients: Uncle Tobys Whole Grain Rolled Oats (55%), Gluten ( Wheat ), Sugar, Skim Milk Powder, Natural Flavour, Cinnamon (0.7%).
long_description: UNCLE TOBYS OATS Quick Sachets Protein Cinnamon Scroll FlavourEnjoy an 'Oat-standing' Breakfast! UNCLE TOBYS OATS Quick Sachets Protein Cinnamon Scroll Flavour 280g (6 Sachets) are a healthy breakfast made from 100% Australian Rolled Oats with the delicious taste of cinnamon and creamy vanilla flavour as well as the goodness of protein to keep you feeling fuller. With 8g of protein per serve they're perfect for a delicious bowl of porridge topped with a drizzle of honey or fresh berries, overnight oats, smoothies, baking and more! For over 130 years, UNCLE TOBYS has been proudly producing quality oats. They source their oats from local farmers and produce their delicious products in Wahgunyah VIC, Australia. Healthy eating, supported by an active lifestyle, makes for a happier life. By continuing to serve families and communities, and supporting local farmers, UNCLE TOBYS are committed to the health and happiness of future generations. UNCLE TOBYS, experts in oats since 1893.

long_description:
Red Tractor Wheat Free Rolled Oats

are grown in Western Australia's premium oat region by the Three Farmers families, who have been cultivating oats for more than a century. Carefully processed to remain wheat-free, they offer a wholesome breakfast for those following a low-gluten diet.

Steam stabilised (never kiln-dried) for a smooth texture, these rolled oats are a source of protein and Fibre, making a satisfying porridge or base for overnight oats and baked snacks.

  • Wheat-free, Australian-grown wholegrain oats
  • Source of Fibre and protein
  • Steam stabilised for creamy texture
  • Source of beta-glucan for heart health*
  • Vegan and vegetarian friendly
  • 5-star Health Star Rating
  • Great for porridge, breakfast, or baking


*As part of a diet low in saturated fat, 3g of beta-glucan per day may help reduce cholesterol.

long_description:
Start your morning with

Red Tractor Protein Instant Oats

, made from Australian-grown wholegrain oats blended with crunchy soy protein crisps. Each serve provides 10g of protein and over 5g of Fibre, helping you stay fuller for longer and ready for an active day.


Enjoy them warm as a high-protein porridge, chilled as overnight oats, or added to your favourite breakfast recipes. With no added sugar and a 5-star Health Star Rating, they're a naturally vegetarian, wholesome choice for any morning routine.

  • Australian-grown wholegrain oats blended with soy protein crisps
  • 10g protein and 5g Fibre per serve
  • No added sugar or artificial ingredients
  • Source of beta-glucan* to help reduce cholesterol
  • 5-star Health Star Rating
  • Vegetarian friendly
  • Perfect for breakfast, porridge, or overnight oats


*As part of a diet low in saturated fat, 3g of beta-glucan per day may help reduce cholesterol.

long_description:
MORNINGS MADE EASY: WAKE UP TO THE GOODNESS OF OVERNIGHT OATS Start your morning with the refreshing taste of apple and brown sugar flavour in a cool, creamy oat-so-good breakfast. UNCLE TOBYS Overnight Oat Sachets are your perfect prep-ahead brekkie, just add milk the night before and enjoy cold straight from the fridge. Made with 100% Australian oats, sourced from local farmers. A unique blend of UNCLE TOBYS thick and fine cut whole oats for that just-right overnight texture. No cooking, no rushing - just wholesome goodness, ready when you are.
  • Easy Overnight Oats - Just add milk the night before for a ready-to-eat breakfast.

  • Classic Taste - Apple and brown sugar flavour in a creamy oat blend.

  • Wholesome Ingredients - Made with 100% Australian oats for a nutritious, no-cook option.

long_description: Did you know? Oats are 100% wholegrain, meaning they contain all three layers of the edible grain (the bran, endosperm, and germ). That means you benefit from all of their natural goodness! As part of a diet low in saturated fat, 3g of beta-glucan each day is required to help lower cholesterol re-absorption. A 40g serve of oats provides a minimum of 1g beta-glucan. Our Australian oats are made with 100% whole grains and provide carbohydrates for energy. They contain a source of protein and fibre, and are low in sodium. Start your day with a wholesome bowl of Coles Rolled Oats.

UNCLE TOBYS Traditional Oats 1kg are a natural superfood* with a source of protein, fibre and contains beta-glucan which helps lower your cholesterol^.

Did you know UNCLE TOBYS Traditional Oats are FODMAP Friendly? If you follow a low FODMAP diet, this product has been FODMAP Friendly Certified so you can enjoy it with confidence. If following a low FODMAP diet, ensure you use a low FODMAP milk alternative such as lactose-free or almond milk.

For over 130 years, UNCLE TOBYS has been proudly producing quality oats. They source their oats from local farmers and produce their delicious products in Wahgunyah VIC, Australia.

Healthy eating, supported by an active lifestyle, makes for a happier life. By continuing to serve families and communities, and supporting local farmers, UNCLE TOBYS are committed to the health and happiness of future generations.

UNCLE TOBYS, experts in oats since 1893.

- 100% whole grain

- A source of protein

- A source of fibre

- A source of natural energy

- A source of beta-glucan, which helps lower your cholesterol^.

UNCLE TOBYS Quick Sachets Hi-Fibre 320g are made with 100% Australian oats sourced from local farmers, specially cut, and rolled to make a creamy bowl of porridge in just 90 seconds!They're perfect for a tasty bowl of porridge topped with a drizzle of honey or fresh berries, overnight oats , smoothies, baking and more! For over 130 years, UNCLE TOBYS has been proudly producing quality oats. They source their oats from local farmers and produce their delicious products in Wahgunyah VIC, Australia.Healthy eating, supported by an active lifestyle, makes for a happier life. By continuing to serve families and communities, and supporting local farmers, UNCLE TOBYS are committed to the health and happiness of future generations. UNCLE TOBYS, experts in oats since 1893.^as part of a healthy diet low in saturated fats, 3g of beta-glucan each day helps lower cholesterol

long_description:
Enjoy a wholesome breakfast with

Red Tractor Australian Rolled Oats

-premium wholegrain oats grown in the rich farming regions of Victoria Wimmera???s and South Australia's Limestone Coast. Gently steam stabilised (never kiln-dried) to lock in creamy flavour and smooth texture.


Ideal for warm porridge, overnight oats, baking or smoothies, these rolled oats are a pantry essential packed with natural goodness.

  • 100% Australian-grown wholegrain oats
  • Naturally high in beta-glucan for heart health*
  • Source of protein and Fibre for fullness
  • No added sugar or artificial ingredients
  • Smooth, creamy texture
  • 5-star Health Star Rating
  • Vegetarian friendly

*As part of a diet low in saturated fat, 3g of beta-glucan per day may help reduce blood cholesterol.

long_description:
Enjoy an 'Oat-standing' Breakfast! UNCLE TOBYS Quick Oats are an easy, naturally creamy and healthy breakfast made from 100% Australian Rolled Oats specially cut and rolled to make a creamy bowl of porridge in 2 minutes!They're perfect for a delicious bowl of porridge topped with a drizzle of honey or fresh berries, overnight oats, smoothies, baking and more! UNCLE TOBYS Quick Oats are a natural superfood* with a source of protein, fibre and contain beta-glucan which helps lower your cholesterol^.Did you know UNCLE TOBYS Quick Oats are FODMAP Friendly? If you follow a low FODMAP diet, this product has been FODMAP Friendly Certified so you can enjoy it with confidence. If following a low FODMAP diet, ensure you use a low FODMAP milk alternative such as lactose-free or almond milk.For over 130 years, UNCLE TOBYS has been proudly producing quality oats. They source their oats from local farmers and produce their delicious products in Wahgunyah, Victoria.Healthy eating, supported by an active lifestyle, makes for a happier life. By continuing to serve Aussie families and communities, and supporting local farmers, UNCLE TOBYS are committed to the health and happiness of future generations. UNCLE TOBYS, experts in oats since 1893.*Oats are a Natural Superfood as they are:- 100% whole grain- A source of protein- A source of fibre- A source of natural energy- A source of beta-glucan, which helps lower your cholesterol^.^as part of a healthy diet low in saturated fats, 3g of beta-glucan each day helps lower cholesterol

  • Source of fibre

  • Source of protein

long_description:
Kellogg's Variety Pack Assorted Breakfast Cereals are great for holidays, camping, work, or to be enjoyed at home.

Each Variety Pack contains 8 new look sachets of your favourite Kellogg's breakfast cereals including:

1 x Kellogg's Special K sachet - Delicious light crisp flakes made with rice, whole wheat and oats.
1 x Kellogg's Just Right sachet - A delicious blend of wholesome grains, sultanas and apricot pieces.
1 x Kellogg's Sustain sachet- A combination of grains, sultanas, apple and almonds
2 x Kellogg's Coco Pops sachets - Grains of puffed rice with cocoa
1 x Kellogg's Corn Flakes sachet - Crisp golden flakes of corn.
1 x Kellogg's Nutri-Grain sachet - Cereal made with wheat, oats and corn.
1 x Sultana Bran sachet - A combination of crispy malty flakes and juicy sultanas.

Nutella & Go! Is the convenient snack ideal for the on the go break. Its unique snack pack has two sections: one filled with crunchy breadsticks and one filled with delicious NUTELLA hazelnut chocolate spread.
- The perfect combination to enjoy the dipping on the go (even at home!), that will make your snacking moment fun and memorable. Dip in! Anytime. Anywhere!
- Find NU & GO! in the Snacks & Confectionery Aisle in-stores
  • Convenient

  • Portable packs perfect for on the go

long_description:
Kellogg's Fun Pack Assorted Breakfast Cereals are great for holidays, camping, work, or to be enjoyed at home.

Each Fun Pack contains 6 new look sachets of your favourite Kellogg's breakfast cereals including:

1 x Froot Loops sachet
1 x Kellogg's Nutri-Grain sachet
2 x Kellogg's Rice Bubbles sachets
2 x Kellogg's Coco Pops sachets

Kellogg's Frosted Cookies & Crème Pop-Tarts are delicious toaster pastries filled with a scrumptious cookies and crème flavoured filling. They can be enjoyed on the go, at any time and are a great snack.

Each box comes with 8 toaster pastries, sealed in pairs, ready to grab and go, or toast to perfection.
  • Tasty on-the-go snack or breakfast treat!

  • Great as an afternoon snack!

ingredients: INGREDIENTS: SUGAR, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*), HAZELNUTS (13%), SKIM MILK POWDER (8.7%), FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER (7.4%), EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL MILK SOLIDS: 8.7%. TOTAL COCOA SOLIDS: 7.4%. *Sustainable and segregated certified palm oil.
long_description:
Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread - a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella's signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that's unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!

  • THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

  • BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It's perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

  • NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!
name: Hazelnut Spread With Cocoa

long_description:
Cottee's Strawberry Jam is the perfect flavour and texture for spreading on a slice of toast in the morning. This strawberry jam is made with no added colours or flavours. Strawberry has long been a classic jam flavour. Cottee's Strawberry Jam is great on sandwiches, pancakes and scones and the perfect filling for jam drop biscuits too. This is sure to be the jam you'll love the best. Great for baking, enjoy in cakes and cookies, as a glaze for pork or chicken or as a topping for pancakes and waffles.
  • No added flavours

  • No added colours

  • Great with scones and pancakes

  • Delicious spread on toast

  • Use to fill jam drop biscuits

country_of_origin: Made in Australia
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: SUGAR, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*), HAZELNUTS (13%), SKIM MILK POWDER (8.7%), FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER (7.4%), EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL MILK SOLIDS: 8.7%. TOTAL COCOA SOLIDS: 7.4%. *Sustainable and segregated certified palm oil.
long_description:
Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread - a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella's signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that's unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, it's gluten-free, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!

  • THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

  • BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It's perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

  • GLUTEN-FREE & VEGETARIAN: We know how important dietary choices are to Australian families. That's why Nutella is proudly Gluten-free while being Halal and Kosher certified. What's more is it's suitable for vegetarians, making it a delicious and inclusive choice for almost every household across the country.

  • NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!
name: Hazelnut Chocolate Spread

long_description:
Try Cottee's Raspberry Jam mixed with yoghurt and muesli, spread onto toast or as a topping for pancakes, scones or croissants. Not just a tasty breakfast condiment, Cottee's Raspberry Jam is also delicious as part of a marinade for chicken or pork, baked into sweet desserts and even mixed with a vinaigrette for a quick homemade salad dressing. This jam is made with no added flavours or colours, and is a great staple to keep on hand. Add some sweetness to your cooking with Cottee's Raspberry Jam.
  • Add some sweetness to your cooking

  • Makes a sweet addition to pork and chicken marinades

  • Great on pancakes and waffles

  • Made with no added colours

  • Made with no added flavours

Perfect for any time of the day, Cottee's Breakfast Marmalade is a great ingredient to keep on hand for a variety of meals.

country_of_origin: Made in Australia
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: SUGAR, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*), HAZELNUTS (13%), SKIM MILK POWDER (8.7%), FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER (7.4%), EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL MILK SOLIDS: 8.7%. TOTAL COCOA SOLIDS: 7.4%. *Sustainable and segregated certified palm oil.
long_description:
Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread - a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella's signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that's unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, it's gluten-free, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!
  • THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

  • BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It's perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

  • GLUTEN-FREE & VEGETARIAN: We know how important dietary choices are to Australian families. That's why Nutella is proudly Gluten-free while being Halal and Kosher certified. What's more is it's suitable for vegetarians, making it a delicious and inclusive choice for almost every household across the country.

  • NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!
name: Spread Choc Hazelnut

Ultimo Intensity 13
Ultimo reveals the smoothest characteristics of dark-roasted coffee with balanced intensity. Its fruity notes survive the high roast for an intriguing coffee experience.
Smooth - Intense - Fruity

Onyx Intensity 12
Notes of chocolate and spicy bitter cocoa flavours are layered with a lingering aftertaste. Coffee's darkest character - roasted and extreme.
Dark - Smoky - Intense

Ristretto Intensity 11

Fresh - Spicy - Complex

Supremo Intensity 10
A blend full of contrasts, Supremo is full of pleasant smokiness with sweet fruitiness too. Remarkably round despite its dark and deeply roasted profile, it is unexpected in every moment.
Roasty - Sweet - Rich

long_description:
Living well should taste as good as it makes you feel. 

That's why we carefully select the finest ingredients to create a range of drinks that help make daily wellbeing deliciously enjoyable. 

Metabolism

We all strive to feel confident and energised every day which is the inspiration behind this carefully crafted blend.

A combination of herbal ingredients including peppermint, green tea, ginger and cinnamon create a refreshing and invigorating blend with added Zinc contributing to your normal macronutrient metabolism.

Sourced With Care
Twinings of London

At Twinings, we recognise our responsibility to source ethically and our ability to act as a force for good by improving conditions in our supply chain. 

Our Sourced with Care programme aims to do just that. Everyone has the right to a decent quality of life and we work to make this a reality in the communities from which we source our materials. Our programmes empower women, enable better access to water and sanitation, and improve livelihoods in the communities in our supply chain. 

Find out more at www.sourcedwithcare.com

Here's four tips you can incorporate into your day to maintain overall health and support metabolic wellness: 

1. Select foods for their good nutrition and taste
2. Don't starve your body of food when you get those hunger cues
3. Fuel your body with enough sleep and water every day
4. Support your health and wellness rituals with a Twinings Live Well Metabolism tea

country_of_origin: Made in the UK
ingredients: Oat Flowering Tops (30%), Licorice Root, Chamomile Flower, Lavender Flower (14%), Limeflower (10%), Valerian Root, Tulsi Leaf.
long_description:
Naturally caffeine free, ethically sourced, 100% organically grown ingredients. Every Pukka plastic-free tea bag comes in its own recyclable envelope to retain the essential oils in our organic herbs. Each bag has two chambers, allowing these incredible herbs to flow and release the full potency in your cup. To help the flavours to fully disperse, pour boiling water directly on the bag. Every herb loves the water, so leave them to steep for the perfect brew. And remember to boil just the amount of water you need to make your cuppa as environmentally-friendly as it can be.

At Pukka, our heartfelt desire is to create a healthier, happier world through the incredible power of organic herbs. We hope you feel inspired to discover more about yourself and the beautiful planet on which we all live. Doing good things helps make good things happen. We create things that help you, help nature and everything in-between. It's called conservation through commerce - striving to positively change the world for you, business and the planet. We are a B Corp organisation, Giving back 1% for the Planet, Fair for Life and FairWild certified.
name: Night Time Tea Sachets 20 Pack

long_description:
Bega Cream Cheese Spread Original with no artificial colour or flavours and has a source of calcium.

Bega Original Cream Cheese Spread offers a luscious and versatile delight that brings the timeless taste of cream cheese to your table. This smooth and creamy spread is perfect for those who appreciate the rich and authentic flavour of traditional cream cheese.

Bega Original Cream Cheese Spread is crafted for versatility, making it an ideal choice for spreading on bagels, crackers, or as a decadent dip for fresh vegetables. The creamy texture and classic taste make it a must-have in every kitchen, adding a touch of indulgence to your favourite meals.

With the 250 g pack, you have an ample supply to keep your kitchen stocked with this essential spread. Experience the joy of transforming your breakfasts, snacks, and appetisers with a rich and luscious taste.

country_of_origin: Made in New Zealand
ingredients: Yeast (contains barley), sugar, salt, mineral salt (potassium chloride), colour (caramel III), corn maltodextrin, mineral (iron), vitamins (B3, B1, B12, B2, folate), spices, herbs, processing aid (contains wheat)
long_description:
Marmite is Australia's original yeast spread that's long been valued as a source of folate and a good source of B vitamins. Marmite is a great-tasting spread that can be enjoyed on wholegrain toast for breakfast, or spread on crackers for a delicious afternoon treat.

-Rich source of B vitamins: thiamin (vitamin B1), niacin (vitamin B2), riboflavin (vitamin B3) and vitamin B12
-Source of folate
-Source of iron
-100% vegetarian

country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 95% Australian ingredients
ingredients: Concentrated Yeast Extract. Yeast Extract (from Yeast grown on Barley and Wheat), Salt, Mineral Salt (508), Malt Extract (from Barley), Colour (150c), Flavours, Niacin, Thiamine, Riboflavin, Folate.
long_description:
Start your day the Aussie way with VEGEMITE! 
 
VEGEMITE is more than just a spread; it's a national icon that has been bringing smiles to Australian faces since 1923. Made from a unique blend of brewers' yeast extract and enriched with essential B vitamins, VEGEMITE is a powerhouse of nutrition and flavour. 
 
Taste the Tradition: VEGEMITE's rich, savoury taste is a beloved staple in Australian households. Its bold, umami flavour, with a hint of saltiness, is perfect for those who crave a distinctive and satisfying taste experience. Spread it thinly on buttered toast for a classic breakfast or add it to your favourite sandwich for an extra burst of flavour. 
 
Versatility at Its Best: VEGEMITE isn't just for toast. Its versatility makes it a secret ingredient in many recipes. Use it to enhance the flavour of soups, stews, and marinades, or pair it with cheese and avocado for a delicious twist. The possibilities are endless! 
 
Health Benefits: Packed with B vitamins, VEGEMITE supports your overall well-being. Thiamin (B1) is essential for brain function, riboflavin (B2) supports your nervous system, niacin (B3) aids in energy release, and folate helps fight fatigue. Enjoy VEGEMITE as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle. 
 
A True Aussie Icon: Proudly owned and made in Australia, VEGEMITE embodies the spirit of the nation. Its rich history and unique taste make it a symbol of Australian culture and heritage. Whether you're a lifelong fan or trying it for the first time, VEGEMITE is sure to bring a touch of Aussie pride to your table. 
 
Discover the delicious and nutritious world of VEGEMITE today. 

VEGEMITE has been fuelling Aussies for over 100 years with its iconic taste and B Vitamins for vitality.

It's been part of the Aussie spirit for decades, celebrating our grit, resilience and everyday greatness.

We're proud to partner with rising superstar Gout Gout - he represents the next generation of Australian sporting excellence - raw talent, discipline, optimism and pride.

Together, VEGEMITE and Gout Gout are inspiring the next generation of Mitey Aussies and celebrating what makes our country great.

VEGEMITE - Makes 'em Mitey!

  • B1 essential for brain function.

  • B2 supports your nervous system.

  • B3 essential for energy release.

  • Folate helps fight fatigue.

long_description:
Start happy with VEGEMITE! 
 
VEGEMITE is a flavour inspiring you to make anything Taste Like Australia and is available with 40% Less Salt^ compared to Original VEGEMITE! VEGEMITE 40% Less Salt^ also includes Vitamin B6 that is necessary for metabolism and Vitamin B12 that supports the immune system. 

Don't limit VEGEMITE 40% Less Salt^ to just being spread on toast, or in a sanga! Add it to your recipe book with VEGEMITE scrolls, VEGEMITE quiches, and VEGEMITE puff pastry twists! or if you're feeling adventurous in the dessert space, whip up some brownies! The possibilities are endless with VEGEMITE! 

Enjoy the same great taste with less salt, helping to support heart health and reduce the risk of hypertension. 
 
Enjoy as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle.

long_description:
Start happy with VEGEMITE! 
 
Introducing VEGEMITE Squeezy - VEGEMITE, now in an easier, squeezier format. Whether you're preparing your trusty VEGEMITE sandwich or adding VEGEMITE to your favourite dish, you'll love the convenience of VEGEMITE Squeezy! 
 
Extra Convenience: The squeezy bottle design makes it simple to apply VEGEMITE precisely where you want it, without any mess. Perfect for busy mornings, lunchboxes, or on-the-go snacks, VEGEMITE Squeezy ensures you can enjoy the rich, savoury flavour of VEGEMITE anytime, anywhere. 
 
VEGEMITE Squeezy can be enjoyed many ways: 
  
VEGEMITE Sandwich: Quickly squeeze a perfect layer of VEGEMITE onto your bread for a classic VEGEMITE sandwich. Add cheese or avocado for an extra delicious twist. 

VEGEMITE on Toast: Squeeze a thin layer of VEGEMITE onto buttered toast for a quick and tasty breakfast. 

Cooking Ingredient: Use VEGEMITE Squeezy to add a burst of umami flavour to soups, stews, and marinades. Just a squeeze can elevate your dishes to new heights. 

VEGEMITE Snacks: Squeeze VEGEMITE onto crackers or rice cakes for a savoury snack that's perfect for any time of day. 

It's the B vitamins in VEGEMITE that give us vitality! Thiamin (B1) is essential for brain function, riboflavin (B2) supports your nervous system, niacin (B3) is essential for energy release, and folate helps to fight fatigue. 
 
Enjoy as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle. 

VEGEMITE has been fuelling Aussies for over 100 years with its iconic taste and B Vitamins for vitality.

It's been part of the Aussie spirit for decades, celebrating our grit, resilience and everyday greatness.

We're proud to partner with rising superstar Gout Gout - he represents the next generation of Australian sporting excellence - raw talent, discipline, optimism and pride.

Together, VEGEMITE and Gout Gout are inspiring the next generation of Mitey Aussies and celebrating what makes our country great.

long_description:
Start happy with VEGEMITE! 
 
Introducing VEGEMITE Squeezy - VEGEMITE, now in an easier, squeezier format. Whether you're preparing your trusty VEGEMITE sandwich or adding VEGEMITE to your favourite dish, you'll love the convenience of VEGEMITE Squeezy! 
 
Extra Convenience: The squeezy bottle design makes it simple to apply VEGEMITE precisely where you want it, without any mess. Perfect for busy mornings, lunchboxes, or on-the-go snacks, VEGEMITE Squeezy ensures you can enjoy the rich, savoury flavour of VEGEMITE anytime, anywhere. 
 
VEGEMITE Squeezy can be enjoyed many ways: 
  
VEGEMITE Sandwich: Quickly squeeze a perfect layer of VEGEMITE onto your bread for a classic VEGEMITE sandwich. Add cheese or avocado for an extra delicious twist. 

VEGEMITE on Toast: Squeeze a thin layer of VEGEMITE onto buttered toast for a quick and tasty breakfast. 

Cooking Ingredient: Use VEGEMITE Squeezy to add a burst of umami flavour to soups, stews, and marinades. Just a squeeze can elevate your dishes to new heights. 

VEGEMITE Snacks: Squeeze VEGEMITE onto crackers or rice cakes for a savoury snack that's perfect for any time of day. 

It's the B vitamins in VEGEMITE that give us vitality! Thiamin (B1) is essential for brain function, riboflavin (B2) supports your nervous system, niacin (B3) is essential for energy release, and folate helps to fight fatigue. 
 
Enjoy as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle. 

VEGEMITE has been fuelling Aussies for over 100 years with its iconic taste and B Vitamins for vitality.

It's been part of the Aussie spirit for decades, celebrating our grit, resilience and everyday greatness.

We're proud to partner with rising superstar Gout Gout - he represents the next generation of Australian sporting excellence - raw talent, discipline, optimism and pride.

Together, VEGEMITE and Gout Gout are inspiring the next generation of Mitey Aussies and celebrating what makes our country great.

VEGEMITE - Makes 'em Mitey!

  • B vitamins for Vitality.

  • B1 Essential for brain function.

  • B2 Supports your nervous system.

  • B3 Essential for energy release.

  • Folate helps fight fatigue.

long_description:
Introducing Bega Whipped Peanut Butter, the latest innovation from Bega, designed to elevate your peanut butter experience to new heights. This whipped peanut butter spread boasts a smooth and airy texture, making it perfect for a variety of uses. Whether you're spreading it on toast, dipping your favourite snacks, or simply enjoying it by the spoonful, Bega Whipped Peanut Butter offers a delightful, cloud-like consistency that is light, fluffy and easy to spread.

The Bega Peanut Butter whipping process incorporates air into the peanut butter, creating a lighter, fluffier texture that is both satisfying and versatile. Plus, its gluten free & contains 5g of protein per serve, making it a wholesome choice for any time of day.

Bega Whipped Peanut Butter is ideal for those who love the rich, nutty flavour of traditional peanut butter but prefer a lighter, more spreadable option. Its unique texture makes it perfect for creating smooth, creamy sandwiches, enhancing your favourite recipes, or adding a touch of indulgence to your snacks. Experience the difference with Bega Whipped Peanut Butter - a delightful twist on a classic favourite that brings a new level of enjoyment to your peanut butter routine. Whether you're a long-time peanut butter lover or new to the world of whipped spreads, Bega Whipped Peanut Butter is sure to become a staple in your pantry. Try it today and discover the light, fluffy goodness that only Bega can deliver.

country_of_origin: Made in New Zealand
ingredients: Hi Oleic Peanuts (99.5%), Sea Salt
long_description:
At Pic's Peanut Butter everything we do, we do for the love of peanuts.

100% a natural plant-based protein source which is gluten free and dairy free. No emulsifiers and weird stuff, just full of Hi Oleic peanuts with healthy fats, high fibre, and loads of protein-

Fresh roasted daily in the world's first solar-powered roastery in Nelson, New Zealand.

When crunchy is too crunchy and smooth is too smooth what's a peanut butter lover to do? Introducing the Goldilocks of Pic's Peanut Butter - SMOOCHY! With freshly roasted Hi Oleic peanuts, its the perfect blend of smooth and crunchy, sitting right in that sweet spot of ultimate spreadability and crunch.

You won't find any nasty emulsifiers inside. The oil rises up and the salt sinks down, just like it should. Grab a sturdy table knife, get it right down there, and give it a good stir.

And once you've scraped every last smooch from the jar (and trust us, you will), don't chuck it, reuse it! These jars make cracking vases, classy glasses, or a tidy home for screws, coffee, or your auntie's marmalade.

long_description:
Bega Simply Nuts Crunchy is made with 100% Aussie Peanuts and a pinch of sea salt. There's nothing else to addSeriously, that's it!

Proudly made in Australia with Peanuts from sunny Queensland, Bega Simply Nuts is gluten and dairy free, rich in Vitamin B3 and monounsaturated fats (the good fats!).

Crunchy
Full of flavour and texture for the perfect crunchy every time. Great spread on toast, or as a snack straight from the jar!

If you are looking for new and delicious recipes, head to www.simplynuts.com.au

  • Source of Protein.

  • Gluten Free.

  • Dairy Free.

description: LEO COCO BELGIAN MILK CHOCOLATE & HAZELNUT SPREAD 325G
ingredients: Sugar, Sunflower Oil, Hazelnuts (13%), Milk Solids, Cocoa (7%), Cocoa Butter, Emulsifier (Sunflower Lecithin), Flavour.
long_description:
Indulge in the luxurious taste of Leo Coco Hazelnut and Cocoa Spread, a hazelnut and cocoa treat spread. Made in Belgium, each jar of Leo Coco Hazelnut and Cocoa Spread has the rich, velvety texture of cocoa with the subtle, nutty essence of roasted hazelnuts. This exquisite blend creates a harmonious flavour that is both indulgent and irresistible.

Perfect for any occasion, Leo Coco Hazelnut and Cocoa Spread transforms everyday moments into extraordinary experiences. Spread it on warm toast for a delightful breakfast, drizzle it over pancakes or waffles for a decadent brunch, or use it as a luscious filling for your favourite desserts. The creamy consistency and perfectly balanced sweetness make it a versatile treat that can be enjoyed in countless ways.

Leo Coco Hazelnut and Cocoa Spread is more than just a spread; it's a treat in every spoonful. Elevate your culinary creations and satisfy your sweet cravings with this exceptional hazelnut and cocoa spread. Treat yourself to the unparalleled taste of Leo Coco treat spreads.

  • Hazelnut and cocoa spread

  • Made in Belgium

  • Rich, velvety texture of cocoa with the subtle, nutty essence of roasted hazelnuts

  • Perfect for any occasion

  • A treat in every spoonful

  • Versatile use - ideal for toast, pancakes, waffles, or dessert fillings.

  • Creamy consistency and perfectly balanced sweetness.

  • Satisfy your sweet cravings.

ingredients: Hi Oleic Peanuts (99.5%), Sea Salt
long_description: At Pic's Peanut Butter, everything we do, we do for the love of peanuts.100% a natural plant-based protein source which is gluten free and dairy free. No emulsifiers and weird stuff, just full of Hi Oleic peanuts with healthy fats, high fibre, and loads of protein.Fresh roasted daily in the world's first solar-powered roastery in Nelson, New Zealand. Pic's Smooth Peanut Butter is silky, velvety, and seriously smooth. So smooth, it should come with a slow jazz soundtrack. We fresh roast our peanuts daily, keeping a close eye on the dials to get that perfect finish, a gentle medium roast with just a hint of caramel. Sprinkled with salt and ground so many times you'll never complain about bits in your teeth ever again. You won't find any nasty emulsifiers or weird stuff inside, just the world's best high oleic peanuts. Because it's all natural the oil rises up and the salt sinks down, just like it should. Grab a sturdy table knife, get it right down there, and give it a good stir. Once you've licked the jar clean (you will), don't toss it, reuse it! These jars make cracking vases, classy glasses, or a tidy home for screws, coffee, or your auntie's marmalade.

long_description:
Never Oily, Never Dry, our original Bega Peanut Butter has been made in Port Melbourne for over 55 years, with the same recipe to consistently deliver the roasted peanut taste Australians love.

Bega Peanut Butter is a source of protein, vitamin B3 and magnesium and is rich in monounsaturated fats (the good fats!). Gluten free and with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives it's great anytime; breakfast, lunch, or tea!

Crunchy
Our original Never Oily, Never Dry Crunchy Peanut Butter is full of flavour and texture for the perfect crunch every time. Great spread on toast, or as a snack straight from the jar!

If you are looking for new and delicious recipes, head to www.begapeanutbutter.com.au
  • Source of protein, vitamin B3 and magnesium.

  • Rich in good fats (monounsaturated).

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • Gluten Free.

Super tasty! Smunchy.

long_description:
Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread - a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella's signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that's unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, it's gluten-free, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!
  • THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

  • BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It's perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

  • GLUTEN-FREE & VEGETARIAN: We know how important dietary choices are to Australian families. That's why Nutella is proudly Gluten-free while being Halal and Kosher certified. What's more is it's suitable for vegetarians, making it a delicious and inclusive choice for almost every household across the country.

  • NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!

country_of_origin: Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand
ingredients: Hi Oleic Peanuts (99.5%), Sea Salt
long_description:
At Pic's Peanut Butter, everything we do, we do for the love of peanuts.

100% a natural plant-based protein source which is gluten free and dairy free. No emulsifiers and weird stuff, just full of Hi Oleic peanuts with healthy fats, high fibre, and loads of protein.

Fresh roasted daily in the world's first solar-powered roastery in Nelson, New Zealand.

Pic's Crunchy Peanut Butter is exactly what it says on the jar. It's proper crunchy with big bits, small bits and all the bits in between, in a gloriously crunchy spread. All Hi Oleic peanuts of course.

No emulsifiers or weird stuff. And that flavour? A gentle medium roast that brings out the warm, nutty richness of the peanuts, with just a whisper of natural caramel from the peanuts themselves.
Every crunchy bite is full-on delicious. Good luck spreading it neatly. You won't find any nasty emulsifiers inside. The oil rises up and the salt sinks down, just like it should. Grab a sturdy table knife, get it right down there, and give it a good stir.

And once you've scraped every last spoonful out of the jar (and trust us, you will), don't chuck it, reuse it! These jars make brilliant vases, stylish glasses, or a tidy spot for your screws, buttons or leftover lollies. Look for the star on your jar - you'll find our iconic lids at school fairs, jam stalls, and kitchen shelves across the country.

long_description:
Our Promise
This spread contains no added oil, dairy or sugar & is made from pure ingredients which have simply been crushed & bottled. 

Enjoy the rich and intense flavour of natural peanuts which have been slowly roasted to perfection then crushed and blended with a dash of sea salt.

With at least 153 peanuts in every jar.
 
- No added oil.
- No added sugar.
- No hardened fats.
- Nothing artificial.
- No additives.
- Locally made.

country_of_origin: Made in New Zealand
ingredients: Hi Oleic Peanuts (99.5%), Sea Salt
long_description:
At Pic's Peanut Butter everything we do, we do for the love of peanuts.

- 100% a natural plant-based protein source which is gluten free and dairy free

- No emulsifiers and weird stuff, just full of Hi Oleic peanuts with healthy fats, high fibre, and loads of protein

- Fresh roasted daily in the world's first solar-powered roastery in Nelson, New Zealand

Pic's Crunchy Peanut Butter is exactly what it says on the jar. It's proper crunchy with big bits, small bits and all the bits in between, in a gloriously crunchy spread. All Hi Oleic peanuts of course. No emulsifiers or weird stuff. And that flavour? A gentle medium roast that brings out the warm, nutty richness of the peanuts, with just a whisper of natural caramel from the peanuts themselves. Every crunchy bite is full-on delicious. Good luck spreading it neatly.

You won't find any nasty emulsifiers inside. The oil rises up and the salt sinks down, just like it should. Grab a sturdy table knife, get it right down there, and give it a good stir.

And once you've scraped every last spoonful out of the jar (and trust us, you will), don't chuck it, reuse it! These jars make brilliant vases, stylish glasses, or a tidy spot for your screws, buttons or leftover lollies. Look for the star on your jar - you'll find our iconic lids at school fairs, jam stalls, and kitchen shelves across the country.
name: Peanut Butter Crunchy

long_description:
Never Oily, Never Dry, our original Bega Peanut Butter has been made in Port Melbourne for over 55 years, with the same recipe to consistently deliver the roasted peanut taste Australians love.

Bega Peanut Butter is a source of protein, vitamin B3 and magnesium and is rich in monounsaturated fats (the good fats!). Gluten free and with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives it's great anytime; breakfast, lunch, or tea!

Smooth
Our original Never Oily, Never Dry Smooth Peanut Butter is silky smooth and big on taste. Perfect for spreading on fresh bread or to mix into smoothies and desserts.

If you are looking for new and delicious recipes, head to www.begapeanutbutter.com.au

ingredients: Roasted Peanuts (99.3%) & Sea Salt.
long_description:
Our Promise
This spread contains no added oil, dairy or sugar & is made from pure ingredients which have simply been crushed & bottled. 

Enjoy the rich and intense flavour of natural peanuts which have been slowly roasted to perfection then crushed and blended with a dash of sea salt.

long_description:
Never Oily, Never Dry, our original Bega Peanut Butter has been made in Port Melbourne for over 55 years, with the same recipe to consistently deliver the roasted peanut taste Australians love.

Bega Peanut Butter is a source of protein, vitamin B3 and magnesium and is rich in monounsaturated fats (the good fats!). Gluten free and with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives it's great anytime; breakfast, lunch, or tea!

Crunchy
Our original Never Oily, Never Dry Crunchy Peanut Butter is full of flavour and texture for the perfect crunch every time. Great spread on toast, or as a snack straight from the jar!

If you are looking for new and delicious recipes, head to www.begapeanutbutter.com.au

  • Rich in good fats (monounsaturated).

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

long_description:
Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread - a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella's signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that's unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, it's gluten-free, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!

  • THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

  • BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It's perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

  • GLUTEN-FREE & VEGETARIAN: We know how important dietary choices are to Australian families. That's why Nutella is proudly Gluten-free while being Halal and Kosher certified. What's more is it's suitable for vegetarians, making it a delicious and inclusive choice for almost every household across the country.

  • NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!

long_description:
Indulge in the luxurious taste of Leo Coco White Choc and Hazelnut Spread, a white choc and hazelnut treat spread. Made in Belgium, each jar of Leo Coco White Choc and Hazelnut Spread has the delicate flavour of white choc with the rich, nutty flavour of roasted hazelnuts. This exquisite blend creates a harmonious flavour that is both indulgent and irresistible.

Perfect for any occasion, Leo Coco White Choc and Hazelnut Spread transforms everyday moments into extraordinary experiences. Spread it on warm toast for a delightful breakfast, swirl it into yoghurt for a touch of elegance, or drizzle it over pancakes and waffles for a decadent brunch. Its creamy consistency and subtle sweetness make it a versatile treat that can elevate your favourite desserts, from cakes and pastries to ice cream and beyond.

Leo Coco White Choc and Hazelnut Spread is more than just a spread; it's a treat in every spoonful. Elevate your culinary creations and satisfy your sweet cravings with this exceptional white choc and hazelnut spread. Treat yourself to the unparalleled taste of Leo Coco treat spreads.

  • Made in Belgium

  • White choc and hazelnut treat spread

  • Palm oil free

  • Versatile treat - perfect for toast, pancakes, waffles, yoghurt, or dessert fillings

  • Delicate flavour of white choc with the rich, nutty flavour of roasted hazelnuts

  • A treat in every spoonful.

long_description:
Introducing Bega Whipped Peanut Butter, the latest innovation from Bega, designed to elevate your peanut butter experience to new heights. This whipped peanut butter spread boasts a smooth and airy texture, making it perfect for a variety of uses. Whether you're spreading it on toast, dipping your favourite snacks, or simply enjoying it by the spoonful, Bega Whipped Peanut Butter offers a delightful, cloud-like consistency that is light, fluffy and easy to spread.

The Bega Peanut Butter whipping process incorporates air into the peanut butter, creating a lighter, fluffier texture that is both satisfying and versatile. Plus, its gluten free & contains 5g of protein per serve, making it a wholesome choice for any time of day.

Bega Whipped Peanut Butter is ideal for those who love the rich, nutty flavour of traditional peanut butter but prefer a lighter, more spreadable option. Its unique texture makes it perfect for creating smooth, creamy sandwiches, enhancing your favourite recipes, or adding a touch of indulgence to your snacks. Experience the difference with Bega Whipped Peanut Butter - a delightful twist on a classic favourite that brings a new level of enjoyment to your peanut butter routine. Whether you're a long-time peanut butter lover or new to the world of whipped spreads, Bega Whipped Peanut Butter is sure to become a staple in your pantry. Try it today and discover the light, fluffy goodness that only Bega can deliver.

long_description:
Crunchy lovers rejoice! In this jar, you'll find our famous recipe with extra crunch (40% more peanut pieces than the average for regular crunchy Bega peanut butter) to deliver even more texture with the roasted peanut taste Australians love. 

Bega Super Crunchy Peanut Butter is full of flavour and texture for the perfect crunch every time. Great spread on toast, or as a snack straight from the jar! 

Our Bega Super Crunchy Peanut Butter is not only delicious but also packed with nutritional benefits. It's a fantastic source of protein, vitamin B3, and magnesium, which are essential for maintaining energy levels and overall health. Rich in monounsaturated fats (the good fats!), it supports heart health and provides a satisfying, nutritious option for any meal or snack. 

Maximum Crunch:
Experience the ultimate crunch with every bite! Our Super Crunchy Peanut Butter is loaded with 40% more peanut pieces, giving you an extra-crunchy texture that peanut butter enthusiasts will love. Each spoonful delivers a satisfying crunch that perfectly complements the rich, roasted peanut flavour. 

Versatile and tasty, Bega Super Crunchy Peanut Butter can be used in a variety of dishes. Add it to your morning smoothie for an extra protein boost, use it as a dip for fresh fruits and vegetables, or incorporate it into your baking for a nutty twist. Whether you're making a classic peanut butter and jelly sandwich or simply enjoying it straight from the jar, Bega Super Crunchy Peanut Butter is the perfect addition to your pantry. 

Here's a quick idea: Mix Bega Super Crunchy Peanut Butter with a bit of honey and spread it on apple slices for a delicious and healthy snack.
  • Source of protein, vitamin B3 and magnesium.

  • Rich in good fats (monounsaturated).

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • Gluten Free.

Our 'No Added' range offers the same Never Oily, Never Dry texture as our original Bega Peanut Butter, with the benefits of no added sugar or salt. A diet low in salt helps to reduce blood pressure, so that's something we can all feel good about.

Bega No Added Sugar or Salt Peanut Butter provides protein for muscle repair, magnesium and vitamin B3 to help fight fatigue and is rich in monounsaturated fats (the good fats!)

Crunchy
Full of flavour and texture for the perfect crunch every time. Great spread on toast, or as a snack straight from the jar!

If you are looking for new and delicious recipes, head to www.begapeanutbutter.com.au
