country_of_origin: Australian Honey
ingredients: 100%    Australian Active Manuka Honey
long_description:
Boost your daily health routine with Capilano, Australia's #1 Manuka Honey Brand, proudly Australian made & owned. Active Manuka Honey is prized for its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, thanks to a key component called Methylglyoxal (MGO) which occurs naturally in honey sourced from bees that forage the Leptospermum (Manuka) tree, native to Australia and New Zealand.

Enjoy daily to supercharge your smoothies, porridge, cereal or cup of tea. Each batch is independently tested to guarantee its MGO levels - the higher the number, the more potent the honey's activity.
name: Manuka Mgo 100+ Honey

description: BEECHWORTH HONEY BEE CAUSE 100% AUSTRALIAN COASTAL HONEY SQUEEZE:.:400 GRAM
ingredients: 100% Pure Australian Honey.
long_description:
Bee Cause Coastal Honey is 100% pure Australian honey that helps protect bees & bee habitats.

Bee Cause Coastal Honey is a bright, clear, light amber to pale amber honey with a deliciously mild & delicate flavour. Salt air, a warm to hot coastal climate and breezes produce a deliciously delicate flavour which brings sunshine and nature to any occasion. From family beekeepers since the 1880's.

By partnering with 1% for the Planet, every jar of Bee Cause honey helps to fund our not-for-profit partners that support the environment, bees and biodiversity.
name: Bee Cause Australian Coastal Honey

country_of_origin: Made in New Zealand
description: COLES SQUEEZY MANUKA MGO50+ MULTIFLORAL HONEY 350G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS:100% Pure New Zealand Honey.
long_description:
Coles M?nuka MGO 50+ Multifloral Honey 350g
  • 100% pure New Zealand honey
  • Multifloral 50+ MGO
  • Easy squeeze bottle
Coles M?nuka MGO 50+ Multifloral Honey is made by bees in New Zealand from the flowers of the m?nuka tree and contains a natural combination of nectars with at least 50mg/kg methylglyoxal as tested by an independent IANZ laboratory.
M?nuka honey is known for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties and has a lovely, deep amber colour and rich, caramelly flavour. Coles M?nuka MGO 50+ Multifloral Honey is a great way to boost energy and can be used as an alternative to refined sugar to enhance the flavour of any dish. The squeezy bottle makes it easy to add directly to food and drinks with no mess or drips.
Try Coles M?nuka MGO 50+ Multifloral Honey in your morning smoothie for a natural burst of sweetness. It's also delicious stirred into hot tea or drizzled over cereal and overnight oats. You can even eat it by spoonful to help ease a sore throat.
name: Squeezy Manuka Mgo50+ Multifloral Honey

Enjoy Rose's Sweet Orange Marmalade for breakfast with butter on toast, or as an afternoon snack on a croissant or scone. This fine cut marmalade is also a great ingredient for cooking and baking. Bring a burst of sweet orange flavour to your meals with Rose's Sweet Orange Marmalade. It's great for pork or ham marinades during the festive season, and perfect for baking cakes or muffins too. Try spreading on top of a chocolate sponge cake for a nostalgic treat for your family.
  • Fine cut sweet orange marmalade

  • Delicious on toast, scones and croissants

  • Use as a marinade for Christmas ham

  • Enjoy with yoghurt and fruit for breakfast

  • Great ingredient for baking with chocolate
name: Marmalade Jam

long_description:
Add some flavour to your breakfast with Rose's Lime Marmalade. Spinning a twist on original marmalade, this lime marmalade will perfectly complement pancakes, waffles and buttered toast. Rose's Lime Marmalade is a fine cut spread for all your cooking and baking needs. It tastes great in cakes and cookies, is excellent as a glaze for meat or can be enjoyed the simple way, on warm buttered toast. Get creative by pairing this Lime Marmalade with scones and a cup of tea.
  • Fine cut lime marmalade

  • Tastes great on toast and in cakes

  • A delicious glaze for chicken

  • Made with lime and other ingredients

Designed for enjoyment at breakfast time, Rose's English Breakfast Marmalade is best served thickly spread on toast. Treat yourself to a morning tea time at home with Rose's English Breakfast Marmalade. Serve with scones or English muffins with a generous layer of butter. Rose's English Breakfast Marmalade is also great for sweet baking recipes. Pairs well with a cup of tea on a cold winter day. Serve up with scones and a dollop of cream when guests come over.

country_of_origin: Packaged in Italy
ingredients: Refined Olive Oil, Virgin Olive Oil.
long_description:
As the world's #1 Olive Oil brand, Bertolli olive oil is deeply rooted in tradition with a heritage of over 160 years of experience in the craft of olive oil making.

When it comes to authentic cooking, it's the little things that make the difference. Each olive oil bottle travels from the olive grove to your plate, bringing the taste of the Mediterranean to you by keeping the quality of its olive oil at the center.

For the benefits of Olive Oil without the taste, Bertolli Light Tasting is a perfect substitute for butter, shortening and other vegetable oils. With a delicate and mild taste, enjoy all the goodness of Olive Oil with just a hint of olive flavor.

Use Bertolli Olive Oil Extra Light to make incredibly moist and smooth cakes, brownies, breads, muffins, and other baked goods.
  • Ingredients: Refined Olive Oil, Virgin Olive Oil

  • Storage Instructions: Do not refrigerate. Store in a cool, dry place, away from heat and sunlight. Olive Oil may become cloudy at temperatures below 20C.

country_of_origin: Product of India Coco Earth AUSTRALIAN OWNED AUSTRALIAN QUALITY GUARANTEE
description: COCO EARTH GRASS FED GHEE BUTTER 500ML
ingredients: 100% pure Ghee Butter (Cow milk fat)
long_description:
COCO Earth Grass-Fed Ghee (Clarified Butter) The Purest Tradition of Health and Flavour.

Elevate your cooking and wellness journey with COCO Earth Grass-Fed Ghee, a premium clarified butter made from 100% grass-fed cows milk. This golden treasure is steeped in tradition yet perfectly suited to modern, health-conscious lifestyles. Renowned for its rich, nutty flavour and high smoke point, our ghee is a versatile superfood that nourishes your body while enhancing the taste of your favourite dishes.

What is Ghee?

Ghee, also known as clarified butter, is butter that has been gently simmered to remove water and milk solids, leaving behind a pure, golden fat rich in flavour and nutrients. Originating from ancient Ayurvedic traditions, ghee is celebrated for its ability to support digestion, boost immunity, and provide clean, long-lasting energy.

Why Choose COCO Earth Grass-Fed Ghee?

Made from Grass-Fed Butter, our ghee is crafted using milk from grass-fed cows, ensuring its rich in healthy fats, omega-3 fatty acids, and conjugated linoleic acid (CLA)key nutrients that support heart health and overall well-being. Naturally Lactose and Casein-Free, during the clarification process, lactose and casein are removed, making COCO Earth Ghee suitable for individuals with dairy sensitivities. With a smoke point of approximately 250C, ghee is perfect for high-heat cooking such as frying, sauting, roasting, and baking, without breaking down into harmful compounds.Rich Source of Fat-Soluble Vitamins COCO Earth Ghee is naturally rich in vitamins A, D, E, and K, which are essential for strong immunity, healthy skin, and bone health.Deliciously VersatileIts nutty, caramelised flavour makes it an ideal choice for both savoury and sweet dishes, from curries and stir-fries to drizzling over popcorn or blending into coffee.
name: Grass Fed Ghee Butter

long_description: Crafted in Spain, where olive oil expertise has been refined over generations, Moro Light Taste Olive Oil is carefully developed for exceptional performance with a beautifully delicate flavour. Smooth and balanced, it brings a light touch to your cooking while allowing the true character of your ingredients to shine. With a high smoke point of 210 to 230 degrees C, it performs confidently at higher temperatures, making it ideal for deep frying and shallow frying with consistency and clarity. its gentle profile also makes it ideal for baking, helping create light textures and beautifully balanced flavours in both sweet and savoury dishes. Naturally rich in monounsaturated fats, Moro Light Taste reflects the precision and craftsmanship of Spanish olive oil delivering trusted performance from the frying pan to the oven.

ingredients: 100% coconut oil.
long_description: MCT stands for medium chain triglycerides (mainly C8, C10 and C12). These are a type of dietary fat most commonly found in coconuts. Because of their make-up, they provide immediate energy instead of being stored as fat. Raw C MCT oil is a healthy fat that can help with gut and heart health, endurance on the sports field, weight management and brain function. If you're a keto diet fan, this oil is for you as it can help the body reach ketosis. It's perfect to use in salad dressings, desserts, smoothies, in coffee or taken raw. What's not to go coco-nuts about?

description: MORO EL PRIMERO EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 1L
ingredients: 100% Spanish Extra Virgin Olive Oil
long_description: Crafted in Spain from carefully selected olives, Moro Primero is a premium extra virgin olive oil that reflects generations of expertise and uncompromising quality. Cold extracted to preserve its natural integrity, it delivers a vibrant, full-bodied flavour layered with fresh fruity notes and a peppery finish. Exceptional for drizzling and finishing, it enhances salads, vegetables and bruschetta with depth and elegance, while bringing balance and richness to sauces, dressings and everyday cooking. With a smoke point of 190 to 210 degrees C, it also performs confidently across a wide range of culinary uses. A natural source of monounsaturated fats and antioxidant vitamin E, extra virgin olive oil is valued for its role in supporting heart health as part of a balanced diet.

Cobram Estate Classic Extra Virgin Olive Oil can and should be cooked with and is ideal for all purposes; including roasting, frying and sautéing. It's a household staple cooking oil and elevates any dish with its fresh and vibrant flavour profile.

*When consuming 2 or more 15mL serves per day as a part of a balanced diet.

ingredients: A Blend of Refined Olive Oil and Extra Virgin Olive Oil
long_description: Crafted in Spain, Moro Mild Taste Olive Oil is smooth, mellow and beautifully versatile. Designed for balance, it delivers a gentler olive flavour with a higher smoke point than extra virgin olive oil 200 to 220 degrees C, making it a natural choice for confident, everyday cooking. From golden sauteed vegetables to perfectly grilled meats and irresistibly crisp roast potatoes, it brings harmony and consistency to every dish. Its soft, balanced flavour allows ingredients to shine, creating food that feels both effortless and elevated. A natural source of monounsaturated fats, Moro Mild Taste reflects Spanish olive oil expertise, made to move seamlessly from stovetop to oven, enhancing the everyday.

country_of_origin: Product of Spain www.congafoods.com.au www.worldofmoro.com.au
description: MORO EL PRIMERO  EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 500ML
ingredients: 100% Spanish Extra Virgin Olive Oil
long_description: Crafted in Spain from carefully selected olives, Moro Primero is a premium extra virgin olive oil that reflects generations of expertise and uncompromising quality. Cold extracted to preserve its natural integrity, it delivers a vibrant, full-bodied flavour layered with fresh fruity notes and a peppery finish. Exceptional for drizzling and finishing, it enhances salads, vegetables and bruschetta with depth and elegance, while bringing balance and richness to sauces, dressings and everyday cooking. With a smoke point of 190 to 210 degrees C, it also performs confidently across a wide range of culinary uses. A natural source of monounsaturated fats and antioxidant vitamin E, extra virgin olive oil is valued for its role in supporting heart health as part of a balanced diet.
name: Primero Extra Virgin Olive Oil

country_of_origin: Product of Thailand
ingredients: Extra-cold filtered rice bran oil
long_description:
Make the healthier choice with Alfa One. Alfa Ones 100% Pure Rice Bran Oil is the most versatile oil in the kitchen. Naturally light and clean tasting, it contains the natural antioxidant Vitamin E and the plant sterol Oryzanol. With a high smoke point at 250 degrees Celsius, it is ideal for all types of cooking including baking, grilling and deep frying. Adds light flavour to your meals. Good for you, good for your food.

Alfa One was the first Rice Bran Oil launched in New Zealand, Australia and the United Kingdom and because of its natural and better for you properties, it has quickly become a household favourite. The Alfa One Rice Bran Oil family also includes Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Brown Rice Oil, Sprays, Spreads and dressings - a product range that covers every occasion from weeknight cooking, baking and BBQs.
name: Rice Bran Oil
